conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program.
org_constraint: Use a professional yet warm tone tailored for an academic audience, avoiding technical jargon.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "The internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks."
instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program. Use a professional yet warm tone tailored for an academic audience, avoiding technical jargon. The email must include the phrase "The internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks."
response:
Subject: Thank You – [Your Name] Internship Program

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunity to participate in your internship program at [University/Department Name]. The experience was incredibly rewarding, and I want to thank you personally for your mentorship, guidance, and for creating such a supportive learning environment.

The internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks. More than just acquiring technical skills, I appreciated the time you took to discuss broader research trends and how they apply to real-world problems. Your insights provided a clarity that extended far beyond the curriculum, helping me better understand the nuances of our field.

I have already begun sharing these lessons with colleagues back home, and I often reflect on the confidence you helped instill in me during those weeks. I would be honored to stay connected as I continue my academic journey, and I welcome any advice you might offer regarding future opportunities or further studies.

Thank you once again for your generosity and dedication to fostering talent. I look forward to the possibility of crossing paths with you again in the future.

Warm regards,

[Your Full Name]  
[Your Current Degree Program, e.g., Master of Science in Computer Science]  
[Your Contact Information]  
[Your LinkedIn Profile URL (Optional)]<|im_end|>
